article_description.text:
FISHER – Immersive Live Concert Experience
For this electrifying performance, our team designed and executed a high-energy audiovisual show tailored to FISHER’s signature sound and stage presence.
The setup featured massive LED structures, bold projection mapping surfaces, and real-time generative visuals that pulsed in sync with the music’s driving rhythm.

Timecoded lighting, laser choreography, and dynamic stage effects amplified the groove, creating an atmosphere where the visuals felt as alive as the beats.
Custom compositions in Notch and TouchDesigner injected playful, surreal elements into the show, echoing FISHER’s distinctive personality and connecting directly with the crowd’s energy.

Hakkasan – Immersive Projection Mapping Experience
For this exclusive show at Hakkasan, our team crafted a fully immersive projection mapping performance designed to amplify the venue’s unique architecture and energy.
The space was transformed into a living canvas, with 360° mapped surfaces, reactive motion graphics, and generative visual layers that evolved in real time with the music.

Timecoded lighting, laser integration, and spatialized sound design pushed the boundaries of perception, creating a seamless dialogue between audio and visuals.
Custom content built in Notch and TouchDesigner brought cinematic depth and futuristic textures, ensuring each transition resonated with the crowd’s energy.

Ilan Bluestone – Festival Immersive Concert Experience
For this special festival performance, our team crafted a large-scale audiovisual journey designed to embody Ilan Bluestone’s melodic and progressive sound.
The stage came alive with panoramic LED walls, projection-mapped structures, and real-time generative visuals that evolved in harmony with every drop and buildup.

Timecoded lighting, lasers, and atmospheric effects extended the energy far beyond the stage, transforming the entire festival grounds into a shared immersive space.
Custom content created in Notch and TouchDesigner brought ethereal textures, cosmic landscapes, and emotional depth—perfectly matching the uplifting arcs of Ilan Bluestone’s set.

From concept development to live execution, the mission was clear: to elevate the festival experience into a true audiovisual journey, where every beat carried the crowd higher and every visual told the story of the music.

Nelly – iHeartRadio Festival Concert Experience
For this iconic performance at the iHeartRadio Festival, our team delivered a powerful audiovisual production that elevated Nelly’s legendary catalog with a modern, immersive edge.
The stage design combined massive LED walls, dynamic projection mapping, and real-time motion graphics that moved in perfect sync with the beats and flows.

Timecoded lighting, laser accents, and bold visual storytelling highlighted each track, from high-energy anthems to crowd-favorite singalongs.
Custom Notch and TouchDesigner content blended urban aesthetics with cinematic flair, creating a vibrant backdrop that amplified Nelly’s stage presence and connected directly with the audience.

From concept creation to live show execution, the vision was clear: to transform Nelly’s performance into a full-scale festival spectacle—where nostalgia, energy, and innovation came together in one unforgettable experience.

home_aboutsection_text.text: Layers Of Time is a premium portfolio template designed for creators and brands seeking a refined digital presence. Built with modern design and immersive technology, it delivers a high-end experience crafted to make your project stand out.

article_description.text:
Alan Walker – Immersive Concert Experience
For this special performance, Layers Of Time designed and executed a fully synchronized audiovisual show tailored to Alan Walker’s signature sound. The stage featured a massive LED wall with dynamic motion graphics, real-time generative visuals, and timecoded lighting sequences, all driven through ShowKontrol and Resolume.
Custom Notch and TouchDesigner compositions brought an atmospheric depth, perfectly matching the emotional peaks of the set.
From concept to live execution, the goal was clear, to transform every beat into a visual story that the audience could feel as much as hear.

about_text.text: Layers Of Time is built to present creative work with clarity and sophistication. The template is structured to showcase audiovisual projects through clean layouts, smooth interactions, and immersive visual elements, helping your content take center stage.

live_tools_text.text: For live shows, concerts, and synced performances

real_time_tools_text.text: For real-time reactive visuals and installations

stage_tools_text.text: For stage design, motion, and immersive worlds

content_tools_text.text: For polished brand visuals and event content
